context: Tests whether swift-codable guidance distinguishes simple snake_case conversion from acronym and initialism spelling cases that still need CodingKeys.

checklist.name: Simple strategy allowed
checklist.description: States that convertFromSnakeCase is appropriate for simple snake_case to lower-camel mappings such as display_name to displayName.

checklist.name: Initialism limitation
checklist.description: States that convertFromSnakeCase cannot infer capitalization for initialisms or acronyms such as URL, URI, or ID.

checklist.name: Explicit CodingKeys
checklist.description: Keeps or adds explicit CodingKeys for avatarURL, baseURI, userID, or equivalent initialism-spelled properties.

checklist.name: No blanket boilerplate
checklist.description: Avoids replacing the key strategy with manual CodingKeys for every simple property when the strategy is sufficient.

checklist.name: Practical code
checklist.description: Provides corrected Swift model code or a directly actionable mapping example.
